THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANDS, RUBY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHIFERAW, AGONAFER DBA RASSELAS JAZZ CLUB $313,443.22 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $313,443.22, WITHIN 10 DAYS OF THE TENDER OF THIS JUDGMENT, RUBY SANDS, IS TO DEPOSIT THE SUM OF $150,303.93 WITH SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT, OR BANKING INSTITUTION APPROVED BY THE COURT, TO BE HELD SUBJECT TO ORDER OF THE COURT FOLLOWING THE RULING ON PLAINTIFF'S POST-JUDGMENT MOTION TO EXTINQUISH THE DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH SERVICES MEDI-CAL LIEN IN THE AMOUNT OF $150,303.93; SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
